---
title: "Home"
---

Welcome to my site. Here you'll find math notes, animations, and write-ups.

---

## Quick example — inline LaTeX

The quadratic formula is $x = \dfrac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$.

Euler's identity: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$

---

## Display math

Maxwell's equations in differential form:

$$
\nabla \cdot \mathbf{E} = \frac{\rho}{\varepsilon_0}
$$

$$
\nabla \times \mathbf{B} = \mu_0 \mathbf{J} + \mu_0 \varepsilon_0 \frac{\partial \mathbf{E}}{\partial t}
$$

---

## Embedding a GIF

Drop your Manim-rendered GIF into an `images/` folder next to this file, then embed it like this:

```
![Manim animation description](images/your-animation.gif)
```

With a caption and sizing:

```
![Double pendulum simulation](images/pendulum.gif){fig-align="center" width="70%"}
```

For `.mp4` videos use the Quarto video shortcode:

```
{{< video images/your-animation.mp4 width="80%" >}}
```
